title: The US blockade of Iran is a gamble. Will it work?
summary_full: The US military is gambling on the blockade denying Iran vital trade - but questions remain on whether the bet will pay off.
summary_public: The US military is gambling on the blockade denying Iran vital trade - but questions remain on whether the bet will pay off.
